notes: Four open Repo Assist PRs: #110 base64, #111 fnmatch/strtod fix, #113 CI apt caching (issue), #115 BMH memmem. All string/mem functions now have word-at-a-time or BMH optimizations. Next: correctness survey of remaining functions, SIMD-style opportunities.
